creator: gjb@FreeBSD.org
text:
Weird.  It looks like something recently changed and broke the upload.

Installing python-3.9_3,2...
===>  Cleaning for python3-3_3
===>  Cleaning for python-3.9_3,2
cd /usr/obj/usr/src/amd64.amd64/release && mv  disk.raw
usage: mv [-f | -i | -n] [-hv] source target
       mv [-f | -i | -n] [-v] source ... directory
*** Error code 64

I'll take a look into this.
